org_constraint: Ensure the email includes the phrase "archived newspapers from 1990."
new_constraint: Avoid using any numbers in the email.

Subject: Document Inquiry

Dear Library Team,

I hope this message reaches you safely. I am writing to inquire about available resources for historical study. My research requires access to older print publications.

Specifically, I am interested in the archived newspapers from 1990. Please let me know how I may obtain these records. Any information on fees or viewing procedures would be helpful.

I thank you in advance for your help.

Kind regards,
A Researcher<|im_end|>

Subject: Document Inquiry

Dear Library Team,

I hope this message reaches you safely. I am writing to inquire about available resources for historical study. My research requires access to older print publications.

Specifically, I am interested in the archived newspapers from 1990. Please let me know how I may obtain these records. Any information on fees or viewing procedures would be helpful.

I thank you in advance for your help.

Kind regards,
A Researcher<|im_end|>
